creator: LoN_Kamikaze@gmx.de
text:
It has today come to my attention that some FreeBSD ports remember the -j flag from the configure stage and thus break during install, which causes package database corruption. 
 
This update forces -j1 for install to solve this.

Note that it might take a couple of minutes because the distfile appears on the sf mirrors. So do not report that the file is unfetchable.
